<!-- Generated by bash/build_llms.sh — do not edit by hand. Rerun the script after changing packages, interceptors, or docs. -->

# ISpect

> In-app observability and QA diagnostics toolkit for Flutter, with logs, network tracing, layout inspection, exports, and redaction.

ISpect is a Flutter/Dart monorepo of focused diagnostics packages. This index points AI
agents and tooling at the canonical, always-current sources so they can read what they
need on demand instead of working from memorized API. Treat each package's exported
`lib/<package>.dart` and `README.md` as the authoritative API surface.

- Repository: https://github.com/yelmuratoff/ispect
- Version: 6.0.0

## Integration prompt

- [docs/prompt.md](docs/prompt.md): paste-ready prompt for an AI agent to integrate ISpect into a Flutter app.

## Packages

- [ispect](packages/ispect/README.md): In-app observability and QA diagnostics toolkit for Flutter, with logs, network tracing, layout inspection, exports, and redaction.
- [ispect_layout](packages/ispect_layout/README.md): Visual layout inspector for Flutter — inspect sizes, paddings, decorations, transforms, text styles, and compare widgets side-by-side at runtime.
- [ispectify](packages/ispectify/README.md): Pure-Dart structured logging, tracing, filtering, history, observers, export, and redaction core for the ISpect toolkit.
- [ispectify_bloc](packages/ispectify_bloc/README.md): BLoC and Cubit observer for ISpect with event, transition, change, error, completion, and redacted metadata logging.
- [ispectify_db](packages/ispectify_db/README.md): Passive database observability for ISpect with operation tracing, timings, slow-query logs, result projection, and redaction.
- [ispectify_dio](packages/ispectify_dio/README.md): Dio interceptor for ISpect that captures correlated request, response, error, timing, and redacted payload diagnostics.
- [ispectify_http](packages/ispectify_http/README.md): http_interceptor integration for ISpect with correlated HTTP request, response, error, timing, and redacted payload logs.
- [ispectify_riverpod](packages/ispectify_riverpod/README.md): Riverpod ProviderObserver for ISpect with add, update, dispose, fail, and redacted metadata logging.
- [ispectify_ws](packages/ispectify_ws/README.md): Provider-agnostic WebSocket diagnostics for ISpect — connection lifecycle, sent and received frame logging, session grouping, and redaction for any WebSocket client.

## Setup examples

- [packages/ispect/example/lib/main.dart](packages/ispect/example/lib/main.dart): example wiring for `ispect`.
- [packages/ispect_layout/example/lib/main.dart](packages/ispect_layout/example/lib/main.dart): example wiring for `ispect_layout`.
- [packages/ispectify/example/ispectify_example.dart](packages/ispectify/example/ispectify_example.dart): example wiring for `ispectify`.
- [packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/main.dart](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/main.dart): example wiring for `ispectify_db`.
- [packages/ispectify_dio/example/lib/main.dart](packages/ispectify_dio/example/lib/main.dart): example wiring for `ispectify_dio`.
- [packages/ispectify_http/example/main.dart](packages/ispectify_http/example/main.dart): example wiring for `ispectify_http`.
- [packages/ispectify_ws/example/lib/main.dart](packages/ispectify_ws/example/lib/main.dart): example wiring for `ispectify_ws`.

## Database interceptors (reference implementations to copy)

- [Drift](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/drift_interceptor.dart)
- [Firebase Firestore](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/firebase_firestore_interceptor.dart)
- [Flutter Secure Storage](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/flutter_secure_storage_interceptor.dart)
- [Get Storage](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/get_storage_interceptor.dart)
- [Hive](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/hive_interceptor.dart)
- [Isar](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/isar_interceptor.dart)
- [Objectbox](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/objectbox_interceptor.dart)
- [Realm](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/realm_interceptor.dart)
- [Sembast](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/sembast_interceptor.dart)
- [Shared Preferences](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/shared_preferences_interceptor.dart)
- [Sqflite](packages/ispectify_db/example/lib/interceptors/sqflite_interceptor.dart)
